title: Toning│調色
description: Add more toning recipes.│加入更多調色配方。
body:
# Preface│前言
In Minecraft, some basic colors are not primary colors, such as green. These colors can theoretically be obtained through color mixing, but there is no such mechanism in Minecraft, which requires us to obtain more resources to craft dyes.│在Minecraft中，有些基本顏色並非色彩三原色，例如綠色。這些顏色理論上是可以透過調色取得，可是在Minecraft中卻沒有這樣的機制，這使得我們需要獲取更多資源來製作染料。
# Function│功能
This datapack adds recipes for green dye, brown dye, and black dye.│該資料包添加了綠色染料、棕色染料和黑色染料的配方。

**※你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方│You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"**
